title: drymaria tenella var. nodosa
intro: Drymaria tenella var. nodosa is a variety of the drymaria plant, commonly known as the small-flowered chickweed or threadstalk. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of drymaria tenella var. nodosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically as a compress or poultice to aid in the healing process.
